    ffi_type

    Group
    Vendor bindings
    struct ffi_type {
    mut size : U32
    mut alignment : I16
    mut type : I16
    ref mut elements : Dynamic
namespace:
    func clone(self: ffi_type) returns ffi_type
    func delete(own self: ffi_type, shallow call_free: Bool)
    func size() returns shallow U32
}

    Group
    Vendor bindings

    ffi_cif

    Group
    Vendor bindings
    struct ffi_cif {
    mut abi : I32
    mut nargs : U32
    ref mut arg_types : Dynamic
    ref mut rtype : ffi_type
    mut bytes : U32
    mut flags : U32
namespace:
    func clone(self: ffi_cif) returns ffi_cif
    func delete(own self: ffi_cif, shallow call_free: Bool)
    func size() returns shallow U32
}

    Vendor bindings
    FFI_SIZEOF_ARG is a I64

    Vendor bindings
    ext_proc ffi_java_raw_size(mut cif: ffi_cif) returns shallow U32

    ffi_closure

    Group
    Vendor bindings
    struct ffi_closure {
namespace:
    func clone(_self: ffi_closure) returns ffi_closure
    func delete(own self: ffi_closure, shallow call_free: Bool)
    func hash(self: ffi_closure, hasher: HashFn) returns shallow U64
    func eq(_self: ffi_closure, _other: ffi_closure) returns shallow Bool
    func to_str(_self: ffi_closure) returns Str
    func size() returns shallow U32
}

    ffi_closure_alloc

    Group
    Vendor bindings
    ext_proc ffi_closure_alloc(shallow size: U32, mut code: Dynamic) returns Dynamic

    ffi_closure_free

    Group
    Vendor bindings
    ext_proc ffi_closure_free(mut _arg: Dynamic)

    ffi_prep_closure_loc

    Group
    Vendor bindings
    ext_proc ffi_prep_closure_loc(mut _arg: ffi_closure, mut _arg: ffi_cif, fun: Dynamic, mut user_data: Dynamic, mut codeloc: Dynamic) returns shallow I32

    ffi_raw_closure

    Group
    Vendor bindings
    struct ffi_raw_closure {
namespace:
    func clone(_self: ffi_raw_closure) returns ffi_raw_closure
    func delete(own self: ffi_raw_closure, shallow call_free: Bool)
    func hash(self: ffi_raw_closure, hasher: HashFn) returns shallow U64
    func eq(_self: ffi_raw_closure, _other: ffi_raw_closure) returns shallow Bool
    func to_str(_self: ffi_raw_closure) returns Str
    func size() returns shallow U32
}

    Group
    Vendor bindings
    struct ffi_java_raw_closure {
namespace:
    func clone(_self: ffi_java_raw_closure) returns ffi_java_raw_closure
    func delete(own self: ffi_java_raw_closure, shallow call_free: Bool)
    func hash(self: ffi_java_raw_closure, hasher: HashFn) returns shallow U64
    func eq(_self: ffi_java_raw_closure, _other: ffi_java_raw_closure) returns shallow Bool
    func to_str(_self: ffi_java_raw_closure) returns Str
    func size() returns shallow U32
}

    Group

    ext_proc ffi_prep_raw_closure(mut _arg: ffi_raw_closure, mut cif: ffi_cif, fun: Dynamic, mut user_data: Dynamic) returns shallow I32

    ffi_go_closure

    Group
    Vendor bindings
    struct ffi_go_closure {
namespace:
    func clone(_self: ffi_go_closure) returns ffi_go_closure
    func delete(own self: ffi_go_closure, shallow call_free: Bool)
    func hash(self: ffi_go_closure, hasher: HashFn) returns shallow U64
    func eq(_self: ffi_go_closure, _other: ffi_go_closure) returns shallow Bool
    func to_str(_self: ffi_go_closure) returns Str
    func size() returns shallow U32
}

    ffi_prep_go_closure

    Group
    Vendor bindings
    ext_proc ffi_prep_go_closure(mut _arg: ffi_go_closure, mut _arg: ffi_cif, fun: Dynamic) returns shallow I32

    ffi_call_go

    Group
    Vendor bindings

    ffi_prep_cif

    Vendor bindings
    ext_proc ffi_prep_cif(mut cif: ffi_cif, shallow abi: I32, shallow nargs: U32, mut rtype: ffi_type, mut atypes: Dynamic) returns shallow I32

    Group
    Vendor bindings
    ext_proc ffi_prep_cif_var(mut cif: ffi_cif, shallow abi: I32, shallow nfixedargs: U32, shallow ntotalargs: U32, mut rtype: ffi_type, mut atypes: Dynamic) returns shallow I32

    Group
    Vendor bindings

    ffi_get_struct_offsets

    Group
    Vendor bindings
    ext_proc ffi_get_struct_offsets(shallow abi: I32, mut struct_type: ffi_type, mut offsets: U32) returns shallow I32
